tagline: Turn everyday strain into smart recovery.

designSystem.style: Modern health app with warm orange brand color, clean card-based layout, circular progress indicators, and micro-interaction feedback. Light/dark adaptive with vibrant accent highlights.

screens: Home - Recovery forecast, daily strain interventions, streak tracker
Scan - 4-question morning strain scan with progress, breathe reset tool
Routines - Guided micro-routines with step-by-step timer (neck reset, hip release, desk spinal, breathe)
Insights - Recovery pattern analysis with mini bar charts and detailed drill-down
Settings - Profile, theme toggle, notification/calendar/location/wearable toggles
